title: Gold Star Ultra
body:
!IMPORTANT MOD IS ONLY IN RUSSIAN!



This mod will make the game much easier. It will add such crafts as: Nezer Star, Dragon Egg, Dragon Head, Elites, etc. Especially if you play with mods such as: IC2(Industrial Craft 2), Draconic Evolution, etc.

Why my mod? There is a balance in my mod! That is, if you need lapis lazuli, then not 1 Diamond = 64 Lapis Lazuli, But about 20 Diamonds of 64 Lapis Lazuli (Approximately, because there is a duplicate in mod). And not only diamonds will be needed! I would not like to, but the mod is made for an engineering type.



This mod will add a Red Crystal that will be needed in the study of the mod! (You can just download JEI :D)

Have you always wanted to craft a Wyvern Sword as soon as possible (Mod: Draconic Evolution)? Download the mod, get souls, and craft a nezer star!

Don't want to download a mod because of a non-balance? Download the Progressive Difficult mod (The name may be wrong) and you will understand why our mod is balance! (Not an advertisement, but a recommendation)
